message:
fix(mvcc): make dependencies wasm-compatible and migrate to Arc<str> values

Cargo.toml: switch fsqlite-pager and fsqlite-wal from workspace
references to explicit path dependencies with default-features=false,
matching the pattern used by other crates for conditional compilation.
Move parking_lot from target-specific (non-wasm) to unconditional deps
since it already supports wasm via its wasm-bindgen feature.

deterministic_rebase, history_compression, index_regen: migrate all
SqliteValue::Text constructors from .to_owned() to .into() for Arc<str>
consistency across the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
